sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59597" key="kraipnofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κραιπνο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n59597.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swift-bearing</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὖραι</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg003.perseus-grc1:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
